senses.gloss: asserting a falsehood, having a false belief

examples.text: فَإِذَا جَاءَ أَمْرُ ٱللّٰهِ قُضِيَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَخَسِرَ هُنَالِكَ ٱلْمُبْطِلُونَ
examples.english: But when Allah’s decree comes, judgment will be passed with fairness, and the people of falsehood will then be in [total] loss.

etymology.text: Derived from the active participle of أَبْطَلَ (ʔabṭala, “to invalidate”).
